meaning: n.文盲adj.不识字的,没受教育的
examples: A large percentage of the population is illiterate.
Nearly a billion people are illiterate.
Try to imagine your life being illiterate.
Biblical scholars turned their noses up, calling it hysteria, theatrics, a faith of the illiterate.
He is as illiterate in that subject as he is erudite in the other.
